case_title: SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS VS 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK: LEGAL DEPT.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-15-1994, DENIED
CERT MAIL TO 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK/LEGAL DEPT. RETURNED SIGNED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK: LEGAL DEPT. HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,246.44 AS TO DEFENDANT 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK: LEGAL DEPT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,192.41 FILED BY SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS AS TO DEFENDANT 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK: LEGAL DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CONT REQUEST SENT TO DEPT 6 AT PLT REQUEST. RESERVED DATE OF 4/15/94 AT 8AM. CHECK FOR 10.00 RECIVED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK: LEGAL DEPT. $2,192.41 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,212.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM MAR-28-1994 TO APR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT 1ST NATIONWIDE BANK: LEGAL DEPT.
